introduction.body: Five operational areas where family-owned companies leave money on the table.

sections.title: How Manual Is Your Order-to-Cash Pipeline?
sections.redFlag: Someone is re-keying order data from emails into accounting.

metrics.label: Monthly float lost on invoice delay

sections.body: Automated workflows can read incoming orders, create invoices, and flag exceptions.

sections.title: Where Does Your Tribal Knowledge Live?
sections.redFlag: Critical supplier and customer knowledge lives in one person's head.
sections.body: Recorded conversations can become searchable operating guidance.
